name: 12_already_zero_stays_zero_on_fail
description: Count is 0 in, condition fails. Stays 0 (the reset branch always assigns 0, regardless of prior value).
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: 2.0 <= -1.10 is FALSE. MC: 80.0 < 60.0 is FALSE. Reset branch; new_count = 0 (was already 0). hit = False. Sanity case: reset from 0 must stay 0.
